name: Turkiye Sise Ve Cam Fabrikalari A.S.
summary: T√É¬ºrkiye Sise Ve Cam Fabrikalari A.S. manufactures and sells glass products worldwide. It operates through five segments: Flat Glass, Glassware, Glass Packaging, Chemicals, and Others. The company offers architectural glass products, such as flat, patterned, mirror, laminated, coated, solar power, and white goods glass products; automotive glass products; energy glass products; and home appliance glass products. It also designs, produces, and sells glassware; retails glass, ceramic, porcelain, and wood and steel tableware and kitchenware, and home decoration items under the Life and Boutique concepts through 51 Pasabah√É¬ße stores located in Turkey and international markets, as well as through online sales channels; and produces and sells glass packaging products for various industries, including food, beverages, pharmaceuticals, and cosmetics. In addition, the company produces and sells soda ash and chromium chemicals, glass fiber, raw materials, vitamin K3 derivatives, sodium dichromate, basic chromium sulfate, and sodium metabisulfite to detergents, chemical, leather, pharmaceuticals, food, textiles, mining, water treatment, and construction chemical industries; automotive and encapsulated glasses; and glasses for light and heavy-duty commercial vehicles. Further, it is involved in the production and sale of industrial raw materials; mining of silica sand, feldspar, limestone, dolomite, kaolin, and quartzite; generation and sale of electricity; trading, purchasing, selling, wholesaling, importing, exporting, and storing of compressed natural gas and liquefied natural gas; glass recycling and waste collection activities; and trading of soda goods, as well as offers finance and investment, and insurance agency services. The company was founded in 1935 and is headquartered in Istanbul, Turkey. T√É¬ºrkiye Sise Ve Cam Fabrikalari A.S. is a subsidiary of T√É¬ºrkiye Is Bankasi A.S.
